title: Board View Keyboard Shortcuts
excerpt: In my project boards i have a plethora of views tailored to different departments, overdue, my tasks, dashboards, Gantt, etc. and I use all of the pretty regularly. It would be amazing to be able to tab through them simi…

posts.author: Bobby.Trick (Bobby Trick)
posts.cookedHtml:
In my project boards i have a plethora of views tailored to different departments, overdue, my tasks, dashboards, Gantt, etc. and I use all of the pretty regularly. It would be amazing to be able to tab through them similar to how one can navigate through open windows or browser tabs.

Ctrl+Shift+V would be darn near perfect.
